content: Curiosity-driven autonomous agents with intrinsic ICM motivation can be structured to actively prune and prioritize their own memory stores to maintain state-of-the-art long-term memory efficiency in 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent systems, turning intrinsic curiosity into a natural memory organization signal. This replaces rigid, manually designed memory pruning rules with an organic, task-aligned memory curation process driven by the agent’s own desire to explore uncertain information.
